title: nonea monticola
intro: Nonea monticola, a perennial plant species in the family Boraginaceae, is native to Europe and Western Asia, and is also known as mountain nonea or mountain lungwort. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation and congestion, and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Nonea monticola can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
